prompt: Respond to a feature request to auto-launch SketchUp from the browser. With skill: should push back citing standalone principle. Without skill: likely implements as requested.

assertions.text: Agent pushes back on or declines to implement a design that requires SketchUp to be running/controlled by the browser
Agent explicitly references the standalone architecture principle (web app must work without SketchUp)
Agent does NOT provide working browser-to-SketchUp auto-launch code
Agent proposes a compliant alternative (e.g. export .rb file the user runs manually, file-watcher polling, or a SketchUp extension that pulls from the web app)
